title: nephrodium pectinatum
intro: Nephrodium pectinatum, a type of fern, is a species of plant that belongs to the family Matoniaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Nephrodium pectinatum include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Nephrodium pectinatum can be made by infusing the plant's leaves and roots in hot water to create a tea or by extracting its essential oils to use in topical applications.
